Lines.Text: [color=#ffff00]> INFO.TXT[/color] ---  sector 7 was commissioned [color=#ffff00]411 cycles ago[/color] as an [color=#ffff00]ORGANIC WASTE PROCESSING FACILITY[/color].  three hundred workers staffed it in rotating shifts. human and synthetic, side by side. a model of cooperation.  then management discovered it was cheaper to throw the workers in with the garbage.  efficiency is a virtue.  end of file.
